_comment: Edit this file to tune what the scraper pulls. After editing, the next GitHub Action run picks up the changes.

google_alerts_feeds.name: Solar EPC tender India
google_alerts_feeds.note: Create at google.com/alerts with query: solar EPC tender India OR "turnkey solar" India. Delivery: RSS feed. Copy the RSS URL here.

google_alerts_feeds.name: LinkedIn EPC posts
google_alerts_feeds.note: Create at google.com/alerts with query: site:linkedin.com ("solar EPC" OR "EPC contractor" OR "turnkey solar") India. Delivery: RSS feed.

google_alerts_feeds.name: Industrial capex India
google_alerts_feeds.note: Create at google.com/alerts with query: India ("new plant" OR "capacity expansion" OR "greenfield" OR "data center") investment crore. Delivery: RSS feed.

email._comment: Filled by GitHub Action secrets. Edit recipients only here.
